name: str-investment-analyzer
description: Analyze short-term-rental (Airbnb/VRBO) property investments by city: cash flow, cash-on-cash, cap rate, break-even occupancy, top-level risk flag, managed-vs-self comparison, and a hold-period return (or indefinite buy-and-hold). Thin orchestration over the public planfi MCP (https://ai.planfi.app/mcp).
